ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the data collection */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county of the data collection */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data collection */,
  "days_with_aqi" INTEGER /* Total days with AQI recorded */,
  "good_days" INTEGER /* Number of good AQI days */,
  "moderate_days" INTEGER /* Number of moderate AQI days */,
  "unhealthy_sensitive_days" INTEGER /* Number of unhealthy for sensitive groups days */,
  "unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of unhealthy AQI days */,
  "very_unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of very unhealthy AQI days */,
  "hazardous_days" INTEGER /* Number of hazardous AQI days */,
  "max_aqi" INTEGER /* Maximum AQI recorded */,
  "ninety_percentile_aqi" INTEGER /* 90th percentile AQI value */,
  "median_aqi" INTEGER /* Median AQI value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., public health department, environmental agency) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., satellite, ground monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., CO, NO2, Ozone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Description of the health impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality data record */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant being measured */,
  "days_with_pollutant" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded pollutant levels */,
  "max_pollutant_level" REAL /* Maximum pollutant level recorded */,
  "ninety_percentile_pollutant_level" REAL /* 90th percentile pollutant level */,
  "median_pollutant_level" REAL /* Median pollutant level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_data_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality data record */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., hazardous, unhealthy) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)
